_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: With 0 of 46 recent 12h windows showing a ±2 point move, this is a textbook coil where HOLD is the statistically honest call — a directional breakout requires the confirmed_if triggers to fire first.
next_move.brains_agree: No — the analyst forward-calls Disbelief (a 3-rung jump from Denial, which is illegal) while the narrative implies an imminent breakout to Hope; consensus corrects the analyst's rung error to Anxiety (+1 from Denial) and holds direction at HOLD given the coil statistics.
next_move.confirmed_if: stablecoin_growth breaks above 45 AND mvrv_zscore reclaims 30 with BTC holding $64k
next_move.invalidated_if: fear_greed drops below 20 with VIX spiking above 22 and funding flipping negative
